CESL/06/2026-27/PM-eBus Sewa3/262704003.display_title: Selection of Bus Operator for 3,604 Electric Buses under PM-eBus Sewa (Tender 3)
CESL/06/2026-27/PM-eBus Sewa3/262704003.why_it_matters: One of the largest active e-bus tenders in India. GCC model means operator funds buses + infra; risk on ops quality and utilisation. Significant revenue visibility for winning OEM.
CESL/06/2026-27/PM-eBus Sewa3/262704003.key_risks: Multi-city coordination risk; depot allocation by STUs; grid availability for high-capacity charging.
CESL/06/2026-27/PM-eBus Sewa3/262704003.eligibility_summary: Bus operators with experience in GCC-model electric bus operations. Qualification criteria specified in RFQ document.

CESL/06/2025-26/PM E-Drive/252601015.display_title: Selection of Bus Operator for 2,900 Electric Buses under PM E-DRIVE Scheme (Tender II)
CESL/06/2025-26/PM E-Drive/252601015.why_it_matters: PM E-DRIVE Tender II covers 2,900 buses plus 3,330 for Delhi (totalling 6,230). Award would be a major OEM order. Status needs monitoring.
CESL/06/2025-26/PM E-Drive/252601015.key_risks: Bid deadline passed; award status unconfirmed. Large Delhi component adds political/regulatory complexity.
CESL/06/2025-26/PM E-Drive/252601015.eligibility_summary: Bus operators with GCC experience. Delhi portion (3,330 buses) handled separately under same scheme.
CESL/06/2025-26/PM E-Drive/252601015.notes: Bid deadline passed 15 April 2026. No verified extension or award data available.
